user.title: Add SleepMe Device
user.description: Please enter your API token to discover your SleepMe devices.

data_description.api_token: Enter the API token provided by SleepMe.

select_device.title: Select SleepMe Device
select_device.description: Select the SleepMe device you want to add.

data_description.device_id: Pick the device by the name you set in the SleepMe app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SleepMe
reauth_confirm.description: Your SleepMe API token is no longer valid. Enter a new token to reconnect.

data_description.api_token: Paste a fresh token generated in the SleepMe Developer API section.

error.invalid_token: Invalid API token, please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the SleepMe API.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found for this API token.
error.device_not_found_for_token: This token does not have access to the originally configured device.

init.title: SleepMe options
init.description: Adjust how often Home Assistant polls the SleepMe API for this device. Lower values feel more responsive but consume more of your per-minute API budget.

error.invalid_scan_interval: Poll interval must be between 10 and 300 seconds.
